mapper.insert: insert into study_material(user_id, title, category, status, important, content, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{category}, #{status}, #{important}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update study_material set title = #{title}, category = #{category}, status = #{status}, important = #{important}, content = #{content}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select id, user_id, title, category, status, important, content, create_time, update_time from study_material
order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select category as name, count(1) as value from study_material group by category order by value desc
select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') as name, count(1) as value from study_material group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') order by name
select status as name, count(1) as value from study_material group by status order by value desc
